## Crypto\_2.IEncryptedFile.keyDerivation property

Optional key derivation parameters. If present, allows decryption using a password with these parameters. If absent, a pre-derived key must be provided.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly keyDerivation?: IKeyDerivationParams;
```
